paper.title_en: Magnetothermopower and particle-hole symmetry in a cuprate strange metal
paper.abstract_en: Here, we report magnetothermopower measurements on overdoped (Bi,Pb)2(Sr,La)2CuO6+delta (Bi2201) single crystals in magnetic fields up to 35 T. Whereas the temperature dependence of the zero-field Seebeck coefficient S(T) can be captured using Boltzmann transport theory, the field-dependent response S(H) cannot. Instead, the magnetothermopower contains a large additional contribution whose field and temperature dependence is consistent with the presence of short-range superconducting order well above Tc. Combined with earlier Hall and magnetoresistance results, these data imply that the overdoped cuprate strange metal contains two transport sectors with distinct particle-hole symmetry: a conventional particle-hole-asymmetric Fermi-liquid (FL) contribution governing the Hall effect and the zero-field thermopower, and a nearly particle-hole-symmetric sector dominating the anomalous longitudinal magnetotransport. We formulate a phenomenological real-space model in which disconnected FL islands are embedded in a compensated Dirac liquid of phase-incoherent d-wave Bogoliubov quasiparticles. This picture reconciles conventional zero-field transport with anomalous magnetothermopower and magnetoresistance and offers a concrete framework for thinking about strange metallicity in overdoped cuprates.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文报告了过掺杂铜氧化物奇异金属的磁热电效应测量，提出了一种包含费米液体岛和补偿狄拉克液体的唯象模型，与全息凝聚态物质领域相关。
decision.title_zh: 铜氧化物奇异金属中的磁热电效应和粒子-空穴对称性
decision.abstract_zh: 这里，我们报告了在磁场高达35 T下过掺杂(Bi,Pb)2(Sr,La)2CuO6+δ (Bi2201)单晶的磁热电效应测量。虽然零场塞贝克系数S(T)的温度依赖性可以用玻尔兹曼输运理论描述，但场依赖性响应S(H)却不能。相反，磁热电效应包含一个大的额外贡献，其场和温度依赖性与远高于Tc的短程超导序的存在一致。结合早期的霍尔效应和磁电阻结果，这些数据表明，过掺杂铜氧化物奇异金属包含两个具有不同粒子-空穴对称性的输运扇区：一个常规的、粒子-空穴不对称的费米液体（FL）贡献主导霍尔效应和零场热电效应，以及一个近乎粒子-空穴对称的扇区主导异常纵向磁输运。我们构建了一个唯象实空间模型，其中分离的FL岛嵌入在相位不相干d波玻戈留波夫准粒子的补偿狄拉克液体中。这一图景调和了常规零场输运与异常磁热电效应和磁电阻，并为思考过掺杂铜氧化物中的奇异金属性提供了一个具体框架。
